name: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
seo_title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator – Easy Calculator
seo_description: Use our free pregnancy due date calculator to quickly estimate due_date based on lmp. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate due date from LMP of 2026-01-15.
result_context: The date of birth estimada es 40 weeks from The última menstruación; solo 5% nacen in esa date exacta.
formula_display: Fecha birth = última menstruación + 280 days (40 weeks)
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que lmp estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online pregnancy due date calculator. Enter last menstrual period to get instant results.
